zh.Harbottle, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德哈波特爾
zh.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Umfraville於1361年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Thomas Umfraville41歲，母親Joan de Roddam34歲。他於大約1380年與Agnes Grey結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1388年被列為sheriff of northumberland。他去世於1391年2月12日在英國諾圖波藍德享年30歲。

zh-hans.Harbottle, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德哈波特爾
zh-hans.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Umfraville于1361年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Thomas Umfraville41岁，母亲Joan de Roddam34岁。他于大约1380年与Agnes Grey结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1388年被列为sheriff of northumberland。他去世于1391年2月12日在英国諾圖波藍德享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Umfraville was born in 1361, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Umfraville, was 41 and his mother, Joan de Roddam, was 34. He married Agnes Grey about 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. In 1388, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as sheriff of northumberland. He died on 12 February 1391, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Umfraville est né en 1361, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Umfraville, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan de Roddam, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Grey environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. En 1388, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of northumberland. Il est décédé le 12 février 1391, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Umfraville 1361 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Umfraville 41 und seine Mutter Joan de Roddam 34. Er hat um 1380 Agnes Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1388, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Februar 1391 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Umfraville è nato il nel 1361 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Umfraville, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Roddam, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Grey circa 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Nel 1388, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of northumberland. Morì il 12 febbraio 1391, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Umfravilleが1361年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Umfravilleは41歳，母Joan de Roddamは34歳であった。約1380年にAgnes Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1388年，27歳の時，職業はsheriff of northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1391年2月12日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Umfraville(이)가 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Umfraville(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Roddam(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 Agnes Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1388년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of northumberland이었다. 그는 1391년 2월 12일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Umfraville nasceu em 1361, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Umfraville, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Roddam, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Grey aproximadamente 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Em 1388, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of northumberland. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1391, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Umfraville родился в 1361 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Umfraville было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Roddam, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Grey около 1380 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. В 1388 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of northumberland. Он умер 12 февраля 1391 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Umfraville nació en 1361, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Umfraville, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan de Roddam, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Agnes Grey aproximadamente 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. En 1388, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of northumberland. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1391, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
